description_long: This chapel is a compact, rustic structure with a wooden log exterior and a stone foundation, exuding a steampunk-inspired aesthetic. The front facade features a prominent arched double door, flanked by narrow arched windows and topped with a small gabled awning. Above the entrance, a large circular window is adorned with intricate gearwork, and the roof is crowned by a square bell tower with a visible brass bell and a pointed roof. Copper pipes and mechanical elements run along the sides, adding to the industrial character, while the rear is simpler, with visible roof gears and no windows. The roof is shingled, and the building is accessed by a short staircase with wooden railings. The overall appearance blends traditional chapel forms with mechanical and industrial motifs.
description: A small, rustic wooden chapel with a stone base, arched entrance, steampunk gears, and a bell tower. Copper pipes and mechanical details accentuate its industrial character.
description_view_0: Front view shows the arched double door, circular gear-adorned window, bell tower, and entry stairs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the copper piping, stone foundation, and side windows, with the bell tower visible above.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain wooden wall, roof gears, and absence of windows or doors.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals additional copper piping, a side window, and a mechanical gear feature attached to the wall.
attribute_steeple_or_bell_tower: Present; a square bell tower with a pointed roof and a visible brass bell is located centrally on the roof above the entrance, featuring open sides and a simple design.
attribute_entrance_door_design: The main entrance door is a double-arched wooden door with a natural brown finish, set within a stone frame and topped by a small gabled awning. It features vertical wood paneling and is flanked by narrow arched windows, with minimal decorative elements.
